---
title: "Can cell classification models be applied to whole slide tumour prediction?"
subtitle: "Image Group 7"
author: "Everyones SID's"
format:
  html:
    code-tools: true
    code-fold: true
    fig_caption: yes
    number_sections: yes
    embed-resources: true
    theme: 
      - flatly
      - custom.css
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 4
    toc_float: true
    highlight-style: monokai
execute:
  echo: true
  tidy: true
---

## 

```{python}
print("This is python code output")
```

> **Simple note**
>
> For little notes?

::: callout-note
## Callout Note

Noting this **calloutttt**
:::

::: {.callout-warning style="color: red"}
## Warning callout

Serious **callout**!
:::

# Executive summary

All text

# Introduction

TEXT

## Background

All text

# Results example

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(reticulate)
use_virtualenv("~/.virtualenvs/r-tensorflow", required = TRUE)
py_install("pandas")
```

# F1 is non-tumor not tumor pls correct!!!!!!!

avg accuracy and f1 for all files + cnn new tom and cnn old tom - total 9

loss accuracy for vgg19 and inceptionv3 before and after - make note of before files

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import re
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from tabulate import tabulate

report_dir = Path('models_code/HOGRGB_KNN_RF/Outputs')

folds = ['Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3', 'Q4']

accuracies = []
f1_scores = []

accuracy_pattern = re.compile(r'accuracy\s+([\d.]+)')
tumor_f1_pattern = re.compile(r'Tumor\s+[\d.]+\s+[\d.]+\s+([\d.]+)')

for fold in folds:
    file_path = report_dir / f"classification_report_rf_fold{fold}.txt"
    if not file_path.exists():
        print(f"File not found: {file_path}")
        continue
    
    with open(file_path, 'r') as f:
        content = f.read()
    
    acc_match = accuracy_pattern.search(content)
    if acc_match:
        accuracies.append(float(acc_match.group(1)))
    else:
        print(f"Accuracy not found in file for fold {fold}")

    f1_match = tumor_f1_pattern.search(content)
    if f1_match:
        f1_scores.append(float(f1_match.group(1)))
    else:
        print(f"Tumor F1 score not found in file for fold {fold}")

def mean_std_str(values):
    mean_val = np.mean(values)
    std_val = np.std(values, ddof=1)
    return f"{mean_val:.4f} (±{std_val:.4f})"

acc_summary = mean_std_str(accuracies) if accuracies else "N/A"
f1_summary = mean_std_str(f1_scores) if f1_scores else "N/A"

summary_df = pd.DataFrame({
    'Model metrics': ['HOG -RGB (rf classifier)'],
    'Accuracy': [acc_summary],
    'F1 Score': [f1_summary]
}) 

print(tabulate(summary_df, headers='keys', tablefmt='grid', showindex=False))

```
